message:
feat(conformance): support BD_BINARY env var for custom bd path

Add support for specifying a custom path to the Go beads (bd) binary
via the BD_BINARY environment variable. This enables running conformance
tests in environments where bd is installed in a non-standard location
or when testing against specific bd versions.

Changes:
- Add get_bd_binary() helper that checks BD_BINARY env var first
- Update bd_available() to use configurable binary path
- Update run_bd_cmd() to use configurable binary path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
